title: Blaster artillery
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Blaster artillery''' was the designation assigned to any mobile platform that was used to support high-yield [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]]. Blaster [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] were terrestrial siege weapons, designed to launch attacks on stationary targets such as military bases, [[Factory/Legends|factories]], and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], with the intent to destroy them. [[Loronar Defense Industries]]' [[MAS-2xB]] was one of the most powerful ground-based siege weapons active in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}
